---
pagetitle: "He Ren, PhD, CFA"
description: "Assistant Professor of Finance"
twitter-card:
  title: "He Ren, PhD, CFA"
  description: "Assistant Professor of Finance"
  card-style: summary_large_image
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  image-alt: "He Ren"
---

::: {.homepage-intro}
# He Ren, PhD, CFA

[Assistant Professor of Finance]{.lead}

<div class="about-links homepage-links">
  <a href="https://github.com/imrenhe" class="about-link" aria-label="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/imrenhe/" class="about-link" aria-label="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=POuWIfYAAAAJ&hl=en" class="about-link" aria-label="Google Scholar" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i></a>
</div>
:::

## Welcome

Welcome! I'm an Assistant Professor of Finance whose research focuses on investments, household finance, and the impact of AI and Fintech on financial decision-making and markets. Feel free to explore my website to learn more about my teaching and research.

Outside the classroom and my research, I'm also a Rubik's cube solver. You can check out my <a href="https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/persons/2025RENH02" target="_blank" rel="noopener">World Cube Association (WCA) profile</a> to see my official results. I'm also passionate about photography. You can browse some of my favorite shots in the Photography section of this website.

[LEARN MORE ABOUT ME →](about.qmd)

## What you'll find here

- [**Teaching**](teaching.qmd) — courses I currently teach and have taught.
- <a href="https://imrenhe.github.io/fin3053-business-finance-book/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><strong>Business Finance Book</strong></a> — book used for Business Finance class.
- [**Research**](research.qmd) — publications, working papers, and current interests.
- [**Blog**](blog/index.qmd) — occasional writing.
- [**Photography**](photography.qmd) — a gallery of photos.
